reason: Enabling FIPS mode via sysctl crypto.fips_enabled on a running system is not supported; FIPS mode must be enabled at boot with the fips=1 kernel parameter. Attempting to change this on an installed system can cause cryptographic module failures, loss of system security functions, and potential boot issues.
estimated_impact: reboot required; Loss of cryptographic functionality; System boot failure if FIPS mode mismatched; Unsupported state leading to service instability
